description_long: This is a modern shotgun with a sleek, elongated barrel and a matte black finish. The barrel features a ventilated rib running along its length, likely for improved sighting and heat dissipation. The stock is a traditional full stock, ergonomically shaped for shoulder support and control, and is also finished in black. The receiver area is compact and streamlined, with a visible trigger guard and a pump-action fore-end located beneath the barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability. The shotgun appears to be constructed primarily from metal and synthetic polymer materials, suitable for urban or tactical use.
description: A sleek, black pump-action shotgun with a ventilated ribbed barrel and a full stock, designed for practical use and durability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the ribbed barrel, full stock, and pump-action fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the ribbing along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the ribbing visible along the top.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ventilated ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
